basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Jodhpur
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Jodhpur has invited applications for the post of Project Technical Support III on a purely temporary basis under an ICMR-funded Extramural Research Project. This is a great opportunity for candidates with relevant experience in clinical research, microbiology, or public health. The last date to send the CV is 14 July 2026. Read the complete details including eligibility, salary, terms & conditions, and application process below.

important_dates.interview_date: To be informed to shortlisted candidates only

qualification.details: Essential Qualification: | Graduate with three years’ relevant experience, OR Postgraduate degree in relevant subject. | Desirable Qualifications: | Experience in AMSP / clinical research / microbiology / public health. Proficiency in MS Office. Good communication skills.

how_to_apply: Prepare your detailed CV along with the duly filled Application Form (prescribed format available in the advertisement).
Merge all documents (CV + Application Form + supporting certificates) into one single PDF file.
Send the PDF to the email: [email protected]
Only shortlisted candidates will be called for the interview.
Address for Interview (if called): Department of General Medicine OPD, Room No. 119, 1st Floor, B Block OPD Building, AIIMS Jodhpur.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: AIIMS Jodhpur has issued a recruitment notice dated 07.07.2026 for one post of Project Technical Support III under the project titled “Implementation of AMSP in various tertiary care centres across India” funded by the Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR). The position is under Principal Investigator Dr. Deepak Kumar, Additional Professor, Department of General Medicine. Download AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Essential Qualification: Graduate with three years’ relevant experience, OR Postgraduate degree in relevant subject. Desirable Qualifications: Experience in AMSP / clinical research / microbiology / public health. Proficiency in MS Office. Good communication skills.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support III 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to send the CV and application is 14 July 2026 (before 5:00 PM).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Technical Support at AIIMS Jodhpur?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy under the ICMR-funded AMSP project.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Technical Support III at AIIMS Jodhpur?
faq.answer: Salary will be paid as per ICMR norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification required for AIIMS Jodhpur ICMR Project?
faq.answer: Graduate with 3 years relevant experience or Postgraduate degree in relevant subject.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support post?
faq.answer: The candidate should not exceed 35 years.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support Recruitment?
faq.answer: Send the merged single PDF (CV + Application Form) to [email protected] before the deadline.

faq.question: Q7. Is the position permanent or temporary at AIIMS Jodhpur?
faq.answer: The post is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project duration.

faq.question: Q8. What is the project name for which recruitment is done at AIIMS Jodhpur?
faq.answer: “Implementation of AMSP in various tertiary care centres across India”.

faq.question: Q9. Will experience in microbiology be preferred for this project?
faq.answer: Yes, experience in AMSP, clinical research, microbiology, or public health is desirable.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the application format for AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support?
faq.answer: The prescribed application format is given in the official recruitment notice.
